Portal.YZO
Developer Dashboard
How to use Portal.YZO
1
Go to any video platform and open the video you want
2
Click the Share button below the video
3
In the share menu, click Embed
4
Click Copy to copy the embed code
5
Paste it in the editor on the left, then click ▶ RUN
၁
Video platform သို့သွားပြီး ကြည့်ချင်တဲ့ video ကို ဖွင့်ပါ။
၂
Video အောက်မှာရှိတဲ့ Share button ကို နှိပ်ပါ။
၃
Share menu ထဲမှာ Embed ကို နှိပ်ပါ။
၄
Copy ကို နှိပ်ပြီး embed code ကို ကူးယူပါ။
၅
အဲဒီ code ကို ဘယ်ဘက် editor ထဲမှာ paste လုပ်ပြီး ▶ RUN ကို နှိပ်ပါ။

© 2026 YZO. All Rights Reserved. 🔒 Your code is processed locally. No data stored on our servers.

Welcome to Portal.YZO, a high-performance Developer Dashboard and HTML Viewer designed for creators and professionals. Our real-time HTML editor allows you to write, test, and preview code instantly in a secure environment, serving as a lightweight alternative for quick front-end debugging.

Beyond code editing, Portal.YZO integrates Public Holidays for 2026 and a daily motivational quote. This dashboard eliminates the need for multiple tabs, combining technical productivity with local lifestyle needs in one clean, professional interface.

📌 Prayer Data Source: JAKIM (Official e-Solat API)
